articles.title: US strikes Iran after attack on cargo ship
articles.summary: Iran accuses the US of violating their deal and says it struck targets linked to American forces in response.

articles.title: Venezuela earthquakes kill 920 people as international rescue teams arrive
articles.summary: Hundreds are still feared trapped under the rubble, as families desperate for news.

articles.title: Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes
articles.summary: Héctor Bello wrote on social media that "you gave your own life for our daughter" in the quakes which killed at least 920 people.

articles.title: Meloni and Trump: A very public fall-out that is proving very hard to fix
articles.summary: Italy's PM was not long ago being called the "Trump whisperer", but their relationship has gone from public attacks to personal insults.

articles.title: Europe's deadly heatwave breaks German record and halts public events
articles.summary: Germany's highest ever temperature of 41.3C is recorded provisionally in Saarbrücken, over the border from France.

articles.title: Religion row as Texas makes Bible stories required reading in schools
articles.summary: Critics say the new reading requirements infringe on religious freedoms and blur the separation of church and state.

articles.title: DR Congo takes Rwanda to international court over decades of conflict
articles.summary: Kinshasa accuses its neighbour of committing various violations since the 1994 Rwanda genocide.

articles.title: Israel and Lebanon sign framework agreement after US-brokered talks
articles.summary: Hezbollah is not party to Friday's agreement, and previous ceasefires between Israel and Lebanon have still seen near-daily cross-border strikes.

articles.title: Ex-Trump adviser John Bolton pleads guilty to mishandling classified documents
articles.summary: Bolton faces a prison sentence of up to five years and has agreed to pay $2.25m in fine, prosecutors say.

articles.title: Christmas market attacker jailed for life for murdering six in Germany
articles.summary: A nine-year-old and five women were killed when Taleb Al-Abdulmohsen drove into the market in 2024.
